statement: If n is even then n squared is even.
discovery_note: finite checks suggest the claim and direct proof establishes it

statement: The sum of the first n positive integers is n(n+1)/2.
discovery_note: finite values suggest a polynomial formula

statement: Finite simple graphs with the same degree sequence are isomorphic.
discovery_note: degree sequence is useful but incomplete
